title: Bridge Essay: A Practical Guide to Resonance Frequency Assessment for Heart Rate Variability B

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Breath/Soul** (Phase 2) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Breath/Soul to mechanistic neuroscience.

**A Practical Guide to Resonance Frequency Assessment for Heart Rate Variability Biofeedback.** — Front Neurosci. PMID: 33117119. DOI: 10.3389/fnins.2020.570400. Heart rate variability (HRV) represents fluctuations in the time intervals between successive heartbeats, which are termed interbeat intervals. HRV is an emergent property of complex cardiac-brain interactions and non-linear autonomic nervous system (ANS) processes. Ahealthy heart is not ametronome because it exhibits complex non-linear oscillations characterized by mathematical chaos.
